name: heartbeat-scheduler
description: Lightweight heartbeat and self-healing pattern adapted from Paperclip + OpenClaw. Pre-flight health checks before expensive LLM calls.

capabilities.service_heartbeat: Check Ollama, SQLite, API endpoints before each cycle
capabilities.auto_recovery: Restart failed services or switch to fallback providers
capabilities.latency_tracking: Track response times per service, alert on degradation
capabilities.circuit_breaker: Disable provider after N consecutive failures (TTL backoff 5→10→20 min)
capabilities.health_dashboard: Expose /api/security endpoint with real-time heartbeat status

rules: Always check heartbeat BEFORE expensive LLM calls
Log all heartbeat failures to security audit JSONL
Provider chains: 5+ models per role with automatic fallback
Self-healing must be deterministic — no LLM-based recovery decisions
